# Gcore DDoS protection

- [DDoS protection](https://gcore.com/docs/ddos-protection.md)
- [About DDoS Protection](https://gcore.com/docs/ddos-protection/about-ddos-protection.md): Protect servers from DDoS attacks using Basic (null-routing) or Advanced (on-demand/always-on TMS) protection modes with configurable ACL rules.

## Onboarding service
- [Service activation](https://gcore.com/docs/ddos-protection/onboarding-service/service-activation.md): Set up DDoS Protection service activation through Onboarding with plan creation, network submission, NOC review, and network configuration steps.
- [Plan activation](https://gcore.com/docs/ddos-protection/onboarding-service/plan-activation.md): Activate DDoS Protection tariff plans in Gcore portal with payment card details and 7-day free trial option.
- [Network submission](https://gcore.com/docs/ddos-protection/onboarding-service/network-submission.md): Submit networks for DDoS protection via the Protected networks form using CIDR notation, AS number, and Letter of Authorization PDF document.
- [Review and approval](https://gcore.com/docs/ddos-protection/onboarding-service/review-and-approval.md): NOC team reviews and approves AS number and network CIDR submissions, validating LOA documents and sending approval notifications with next steps.
- [Network configuration](https://gcore.com/docs/ddos-protection/onboarding-service/network-configuration.md): Configure GRE endpoint and protection profile for DDoS-protected networks in Gcore Customer Portal.
- [Configure a custom protection profile](https://gcore.com/docs/ddos-protection/onboarding-service/custom-protection-profile-configuration.md): Create custom DDoS protection profiles with rules and policies for network traffic filtering, including protocol-aware templates for Minecraft and Counter-St...
- [Apply a custom profile to a protected network](https://gcore.com/docs/ddos-protection/onboarding-service/apply-a-custom-profile-to-a-protected-network.md): Assign custom DDoS protection profiles to protected networks via Gcore Customer Portal's Edit protected network dialog and Profile dropdown.

## GRE tunneling
- [About Gcore's DDoS protection with GRE tunneling and BGP routing](https://gcore.com/docs/ddos-protection/onboarding-service/gre-tunneling/about-gcore-ddos-protection-with-gre-tunneling-and-bgp-routing.md): Configure GRE tunneling and BGP routing for DDoS protection with MTU/MSS optimization and autonomous system path selection.
- [Set a GRE tunnel with Gcore](https://gcore.com/docs/ddos-protection/onboarding-service/gre-tunneling/set-a-gre-tunnel-with-gcore.md): Configure GRE tunnel endpoints on Cisco routers with tunnel ID, IP addressing, MTU/MSS limits, and BGP peering for traffic routing.
- [Troubleshooting](https://gcore.com/docs/ddos-protection/onboarding-service/troubleshooting.md): Resolve network submission failures, pending status delays, GRE endpoint configuration errors, and custom profile visibility issues with CIDR validation, AS ...

## Super transit
- [Super transit](https://gcore.com/docs/ddos-protection/super-transit.md): Route traffic through Gcore's anycast network using Super Transit for DDoS mitigation, threat detection, and latency optimization via GRE tunneling.
- [Configure your infrastructure for Super Transit](https://gcore.com/docs/ddos-protection/super-transit/configure-super-transit.md): Enable Super Transit DDoS protection by configuring anycast tunneling, verifying router MSS clamping support, IRR entries, ASNs, and RPKI validation for on-p...
- [Gcore radar reports methodologies](https://gcore.com/docs/ddos-protection/gcore-radar-reports-methodologies.md): Analyze DDoS attack patterns from Gcore scrubbing centers using Radar report methodologies: origin/victim geolocation, industry targeting, attack characteris...
- [DDoS events log](https://gcore.com/docs/ddos-protection/events-log.md): Access DDoS events log in Gcore Customer Portal to view attack metrics (BPS, PPS, source IPs) from past three months for incident analysis and trend identifi...
